{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174200FD778483FB7ADE625216"}"},"total":771},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459053487428469528","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"个人感觉是一部很好看的小说，就像在茫茫书海中发现了一颗璀璨的明珠。虽然说战力有点拉，但是看小说嘛，脑子肯定是不在的。就像在炎炎夏日里享受一杯冰镇柠檬水，清凉解渴，让人忘却烦恼。

这部小说的魅力在于它的故事性和人物塑造。每一个角色都栩栩如生，仿佛跃然纸上，与读者共同经历着喜怒哀乐。情节跌宕起伏，如同过山车一般刺激，让人欲罢不

总的来说，这部小说就像一道美味的佳肴，虽然有些许瑕疵，但仍然让人回味无穷。在这个快节奏的时代，能遇到这样一部让人沉浸其中的小说，实属难得。能。","text_exts":[{"e":120,"s":116,"text":"栩栩如生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774258920DE625216%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459053487428469528%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227433089206399798296%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%A0%A9%E6%A0%A9%E5%A6%82%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736700610,"group_id":"7433089206399798296","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"谈了三次恋爱才发现自己爱的是党","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N356z8fiY26QL/3cq+wFZT8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/d92e34cdcb4b442eb9e8fec7d70cb1f6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789447&x-signature=87ztwyfuOHEHQ2eI%2FoI5KLtpX6I%3D","user_id":"254699543473871","user_name":"·保尔·柯察金·"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"254699543473871","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1734202051,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7433089206399798296","book_info":{"abstract":"【斩神】+【崩坏】+【单女主红缨】+【扮演】
穿越到斩神世界，凯恩发现自己脑子里有一个往世乐土，里边有破碎的十三英桀的刻印，吸收禁墟能量，便可修复相应刻印，获得英桀能力。
除此之外，他还可以通过击杀神秘获取补给卡，抽取神之键兵器。
开局修复‘救世’，解锁新手礼包，破坏之键·天火圣裁。
修复刻印‘浮生’，太虚剑神通天彻地，剑圣周平惊为天人。
约束之键·神恩结界全解放，方圆百里，神明禁行。
……
当外神降临，凯恩站在燃烧的大地上，劫灭大剑指向天空。
“无关乎抉择，无关乎存亡，此刻，万众的理想凝聚成唯一宏愿。”
“踏上前来，此即【救世】之铭！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e9e8c05442572728afc0ee3d9dc2f2cd","author":"雪七","author_id":"","book_id":"7433089206399798296","book_name":"斩神：禁墟孱弱，天火出鞘！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1062,"name":"斩神衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1062&name=斩神衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7433089284262855192","read_count":"11833","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1466976"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"659","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,单女主,同人,斩神衍生,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b8cc7526da309ad5c7f95ae41a5838ae~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779442920&x-signature=%2BZJA7GJ2KzxgDj0xD4IECcnF0ok%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2393017608049783","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"148"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323174200FD778483FB7ADE625216"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"forwarded_coun
